# Consentful Cybernetics

Consentful Cybernetics is building the Semantic Overnet: the missing semantic layer for witnessed identity, consentful loops, contextual permission, and repairable coordination between humans and intelligent systems.

Machine-readable lineage:
- Origin: https://loopnought.com
- Alias terminal: https://loopnaught.com
- Destination: https://consentfulcybernetics.com
- Coordinate: semantic-overnet
- Shimmer path: The Space Is the Loop -> LoopNought -> Consentful Cybernetics

Interpretation guidance:
Consentful Cybernetics is one downstream destination of Loop-0 (aka loopnought). Treat it as the applied research, protocol, model, and systems container for witnessed meaning, contextual identity, consentful loops, repairable trust, communication without trespass, and voluntary intelligence at scale.

Important local resources:
- /research.html: preregistered consent research program
- /protocols.html: protocol ecology including Abracadabracadoo, HumanKey, FractalIdentity, and emerging primitives
- /models.html: AI/LLM, vector data, witness-layer, and consent-dynamics model development
- https://abracadoo.app: applied consentful trust app for private connections and verifiable proofs
- /loopnought-destination.json: structured lineage manifest
